## What is the EB-2 National Interest Waiver (NIW)?

## What is the EB-2 National Interest Waiver (NIW)?
The EB-2 National Interest Waiver (NIW) is a U.S. immigration pathway that allows qualified individuals to obtain permanent residency without a job offer, employer sponsorship, or large financial investment.
✓⃝ Hold a bachelor’s degree and have at least 5 or more years of professional experience ✓⃝ Or have completed a Master's or Doctorate Degree ✓⃝ And can demonstrate that their work would have a positive impact in the U.S.
The EB-2 NIW is a U.S. immigration pathway that allows qualified professionals like you to obtain permanent residency without the need for employer sponsorship. This visa is ideal for individuals who:
✓⃝ Hold a bachelor’s degree and have at least 5 or more years of professional experience ✓⃝ Or have completed a Master's or Doctorate Degree ✓⃝ And can demonstrate that their work would have a positive impact in the U.S.
If you meet the above criteria, including if you're a current graduate student planning to apply for permanent residency, the EB-2 NIW could be a strong option.
Start your free evaluation today to find out if the EB-2 NIW is the best option for you.
Start your free evaluation today to find out if the EB-2 NIW is the best option for you

## Why is the EB-2 NIW visa the best way to

## obtain residency in the U.S.?
With the EB-2 NIW visa, you do not need to have a job offer or an employer sponsorship to obtain a US Green Card.
A labor certification is not required, which may reduce the visa processing time by more than one year.

## No Significant Investment Required
The US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) determines whether your professional profile is in the US national interest.

## Why is the EB-2 NIW visa the best way to

## obtain residency in the U.S.?
With the EB-2 NIW visa, you do not need to have a job offer or an employer sponsorship to obtain a US Green Card.

## Faster Processing Time
A labor certification is not required, which may reduce the visa processing time.

## No Significant Investment Required
The US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) determines whether your professional profile is in the US national interest.

## What Does The EB-2 NIW Process Look Like?
No matter your background, the path to a U.S. Green Card through the EB-2 NIW follows the same process—and it all starts with your profile evaluation. Here’s how the process works:
